title: Wizards RPG
description: An immersive RPG world based on magic.
body:
Wizards RPG is based around the "Wizards" mod and the "Palidans and Priests" mod. You can craft a magic wand and get started on your journey. It also includes some mods to make the gameplay more immersive. The Origins mod and Origins RPG mod have been added. For more information on classes added in Origins RPG check out their mod page.

For extra information use this video: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=Whu5gJrLOcw&t=546s

Every mod I wanted to add to this pack was in Modrinth, so you don't need to manually install anything! I didn't add many performance mods because sometimes they lag games more, so if your game doesn't work first try adding performance mods! If it still doesn't work there are a few mods like Terralith you can get rid of. I didn't put in a shader mod because the average PC won't be able to handle this mod pack + shaders. If you think yours can i would recommend using Iris instead of Optifine.

For a better experience download the Guard Villagers Fabric mod and Better Third Person.

https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/better-third-person

https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/guard-villagers-fabric

If you want to play with your friends easily, use the Essentials mod.

Most RPGs don't make you lose your items if you die so turn on keep inventory.

If you want it to be harder but still have an RPG feeling use Requiem.

If you want a resource pack to use I recommend using one or some of the resource packs listed in the video below:

https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=lEDHPl71j-o
